movies.title: Movies
movies.subtitle: Browse and selectively delete movies. Files are removed via Radarr and added to the import exclusion list.
movies.empty: No movies match the current filter.
series.title: Series
series.subtitle: Delete at series, season, or individual episode level.
series.empty: No series match the current filter.
music.title: Music
music.subtitle: Delete artists, albums, or individual tracks.
music.empty: No artists match the current filter.
logs.title: Activity
logs.subtitle: Every deletion is logged here with timestamp, scope, mode, and result.
logs.empty: No log entries match the current filter.
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Saved to config.yaml. Jellyfin is required; Radarr, Sonarr, and Lidarr are optional — leave both fields empty to disable a tab.
settings.language_hint: Choose the language for the Selectarr interface.
col.title: Title
filter.watched_any: Watched by at least one user
filter.listened_any: Played by at least one user
banner.dry_run_detail: No files will be touched. This shows what would happen.
banner.delete_warning_detail_movies: Files are removed from disk by Radarr. This cannot be undone.
banner.delete_warning_detail_series: Files are removed from disk by Sonarr. This cannot be undone.
banner.delete_warning_detail_music: Files are removed from disk by Lidarr. This cannot be undone.
confirm.title: Review before delete
home.title: Overview
home.subtitle: Library statistics across all connected services.
login.title: Selectarr
login.subtitle: Sign in with your Jellyfin account
